The 2021 Tesla Model Y Long Range with ALL-WHEEL DRIVE helped redefine what buyers expect from a modern luxury crossover. Combining impressive electric range, exhilarating performance, cutting-edge technology, and remarkable everyday practicality, the Model Y quickly became one of the world's best-selling electric vehicles. With only 25,469 miles on the odometer, this one-owner example remains exceptionally fresh and continues to showcase why Tesla has become synonymous with EV innovation. The Model Y occupies a unique position in the market by blending crossover versatility with sports-sedan performance and zero-emission driving. Its spacious interior, expansive cargo capacity, advanced software ecosystem, and impressive electric range make it equally well suited for commuting, family duty, and long-distance travel.
